en: Don't come any closer. Come on. Just give me your hand. I'll pull you back over.
No! Stay where you are. I mean it.
ko: 안 돼! 그 자리에서 움직이지 마.

en: No, you won't. What do you mean, no, I won't?
Don't presume to tell me what I will and will not do. You don't know me.
ko: 내가 뭘 할지 말하지 마. 넌 나를 몰라.

en: Well, you would have done it already. You're distracting me. Go away.
You let go and I'm going to have to jump in there after you.
Don't be absurd. You'll be killed.
I'm a good swimmer. A fall alone would kill you.
ko: 떨어지기만 해도 죽을 거야. 아플 거야.

en: It would hurt. I'm not saying it wouldn't.
